input_dict.question: Ronnie Dunn and Jenna Sanz-Agero were both formerly part of bands in which they each acted in what role?
input_dict.source_summary: {"summary":"Both Ronnie Dunn and Jenna Sanz-Agero are identified as singers/vocalists. Jenna Sanz-Agero is the former lead singer of the female rock group Vixen. Ronnie Dunn is an American country music singer-songwriter who served as a vocalist in the duo Brooks & Dunn."}
input_dict.target_summary:
Integrated evidence summary:

- Jenna Sanz-Agero: Jenna Sanz-Agero is described in the retrieved material as "the former lead singer of the female rock group Vixen." (visible support)

- Ronnie Dunn: The retrieved material identifies Ronnie Gene Dunn as "an American country music singer-songwriter." (visible support) Summary_1 additionally notes that the duo Brooks & Dunn consisted of Kix Brooks and Ronnie Dunn, described there as "both vocalists and songwriters." (summary_1)

These retained facts (Jenna explicitly labeled a former lead singer; Ronnie identified as a singer-songwriter and described in summary_1 as one of Brooks & Dunn's vocalists/songwriters) provide the evidence needed for the final-answer agent to determine the roles each performed in their bands.
input_dict.candidate_summary: Both Ronnie Dunn and Jenna Sanz-Agero served as singers/vocalists in their bands. Jenna Sanz-Agero is the former lead singer of the female rock group Vixen. Ronnie Dunn is an American country music singer-songwriter who served as a vocalist in the duo Brooks & Dunn.
